values: Management view of request quality, promo cost reviews, campaign outcomes, and execution control.
Use this sheet to assign owners, due dates, evidence, and status for the four-week rollout.

Set up basic dashboard: volume, QC, SLA

values: Yellow cells are inputs. Gate Status and Missing Required Fields calculate automatically after a Campaign ID is entered.
Review caps, usage, duplication, abuse risk, and terms. Recommendation is formula-driven; management owns the final decision.
Record every failure, owner, corrective action, and repeat issue. Positive Days Overdue means the item needs attention.
Enter results after each campaign. Rates, unit costs, and deposit uplift calculate automatically.
A practical operating system for the Promo value-creation framework.
Keep, reduce cap, review, or sunset
A completeness check confirming objective, audience, timing, budget, mechanics, success measure, and data owner before setup begins.
A health check of current promotions to decide what to keep, adjust, review, or retire.
Players depositing within 72 hours divided by total claims; directional until attribution is established.
Maximum bonus cap divided by average claimant deposit; values above 2.0x are flagged for cap review.
A short campaign review covering objective, cost, claims, deposits, issues, learning, and next action.
